photorealistic.promptSuffix: . Shot on professional DSLR, natural lighting, sharp focus.

social-media.promptSuffix: . Vibrant colors, clean composition, trending aesthetic.

product.promptSuffix: . Clean white background, studio lighting, commercial quality.

banner.promptSuffix: . Cinematic composition, suitable for web header or hero section.

thumbnail.promptSuffix: . High contrast, bold composition, eye-catching at small sizes.

illustration.promptSuffix: . Clean lines, vivid colors, modern digital art aesthetic.

cinematic.promptSuffix: . Anamorphic widescreen, shallow depth of field, dramatic lighting, film grain.
